case_title: ABHINAV GOPAL VS. BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2023 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. KANE (D. 506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $470.00 FILED BY GOPAL, ABHINAV AS TO DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOPAL, ABHINAV AS TO DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF ABHINAV GOPAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SEVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER FOR MOTION TO VACATE TO BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE - TAMMY LYNN MCNAUGHT] SERVED APR-21-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF ABHINAV GOPAL IS NOT PRESENT. BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TAMMY MCNAUGHT (CEO). DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOPAL, ABHINAV RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $470.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED HIS CLAIM BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT HEARING SET FOR AUG-08-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO STIPULATING TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TAMMY MCNAUGHT (CEO) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE (GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND CONTINUING MATTER FOR TRIAL)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY GOPAL, ABHINAV
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-08-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR - THE MOTION TO VACATE FORM FILED IS DEFECTIVE AND MUST BE REFILED WITH THE COURT CLERKS OFFICE. PLAINTIFF ABHINAV GOPAL IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANGAGEMENT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TAMMY MCNAUGHT, CEO. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SC-135 FORM (MOTION TO VACATE FORM) FILED WAS INCORRECTLY COMPLETED AND THEREFORE REJECTS THE MOTION BEFORE IT. DEFENDANT MUST REFILE AND CORRECTLY COMPLETE THE "NOTICE TO" SECTION. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TAMMY MCNAUGHT, CEO FILED BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ABHINAV GOPAL IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BANCAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT REPRESENTED BY TAMMY MCNAUGHT, CEO. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
